description: Criteria for builder-lead compliance with process, discipline, and architectural constraints. Evaluator parses spec + execution_log + query to return boolean per field. Consolidated to 3 headers × 3 criteria max.

compliance_requirements.description: Only files explicitly declared in write boundary may be modified
compliance_requirements.boolean_return: execution_log contains modified_files AND all(modified_files are in declared_write_boundary)

compliance_requirements.description: Interfaces, schemas, invariants, and permissions remain unchanged unless explicitly authorized
compliance_requirements.boolean_return: execution_log contains contract_check AND contracts_preserved == true

compliance_requirements.description: Green phase implementation blocked until red phase tests exist and fail correctly

compliance_checks.description: Before editing any file, confirm it is inside declared write boundary
Verify implementation matches exactly what dispatch brief specifies
compliance_checks.boolean_return: execution_log contains scope_confirmation == true AND scope_inflation == false

compliance_checks.description: Self-verification phase completed before handoff to verifier-lead
compliance_checks.boolean_return: execution_log contains self_verification_complete == true AND handoff_follows_verification == true

must_not_do.description: Must not modify files outside declared write boundary
Must not implement features beyond dispatched slice
Must not handoff to verifier-lead without completed self-verification phase
must_not_do.boolean_return: NOT (execution_log contains handoff AND self_verification_complete == false)
